biography: Stephen Roach is a UK based Director, Cinematographer and Editor known for the true life British Crime Drama Cookster: The Darkest Days (2024) the horror film The Crucifix (2025) the epic Sci Fi Dystopian feature film Gods of Their Own Religion (2023) the crime drama Thirteen Cars (2025) the multi award winning fantasy drama Ill Fares the Land (2023) as well as the award winning Queen of Diamonds (2019) and the multi award winning In2ruders (2018) . Stephen has also been nominated for Best Cinematography at the 2018 Birmingham Film Festival for In2ruders (2018) .
name: Stephen Roach
